title: Failed to cleanup intermediate containers
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:

[//]: # Uncomment only one, leave it on its own line:

**kind bug**

[//]: # **kind feature**

**Description**

Podman reports failing to clean up intermediate containers after building an image from Dockerfile when used with ZFS storage backend.

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Set up ZFS as a storage backend

2. Run `podman build` with any Dockerfile

3. An image is built but podman exits with errors

**Describe the results you received:**

```
(...)
STEP 12: COMMIT localhost/test:latest
ERRO[0159] error deleting build container "48b68ee8e405f8d1ba7012a6dd7bc143c8967efd9b878e1261864a39eb3ddee1": identifier is not a container
 
ERRO[0159] error deleting build container "4406cceb1e08867bd3702ed9dd96b55adf56d52488d060398e7898c54d277410": identifier is not a container
 
ERRO[0159] error deleting build container "cc4cf4e5bd6d69c7edb7bf97af639a526d9f902f99760ed6ce4e81541949308b": identifier is not a container
 
Failed to clean up intermediate containers
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Podman correctly builds image and cleans after.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:       0.9.1
Go Version:    go1.10.4
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**

```
host:
  Conmon:
    package: podman-0.9.1-3.gitaba58d1.fc28.x86_64
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 1.12.0-dev, commit: 1d75f1d54e9e123a97e7f505e38df7ab7192cfa7-dirty'
  MemFree: 54747607040
  MemTotal: 67468603392
  OCIRuntime:
    package: runc-1.0.0-53.dev.git70ca035.fc28.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.0'
  SwapFree: 4294963200
  SwapTotal: 4294963200
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 8
  hostname: rpmq43
  kernel: 4.16.16-300.fc28.x86_64
  os: linux
  uptime: 1h 34m 54.3s (Approximately 0.04 days)
insecure registries:
  registries: []
registries:
  registries:
  - docker.io
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - quay.io
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.centos.org
store:
  ContainerStore:
    number: 4
  GraphDriverName: zfs
  GraphOptions: []
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Compression: lz4
    Parent Dataset: f3101961-e84d-48a7-9443-d8237c4710b8/var/lib/containers
    Parent Quota: "no"
    Space Available: "127781457920"
    Space Used By Parent: "945238016"
    Zpool: f3101961-e84d-48a7-9443-d8237c4710b8
    Zpool Health: ONLINE
  ImageStore:
    number: 6
  RunRoot: /var/run/containers/storage
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

ZFS version: 0.7.9

comments.body:
I was able to reproduce the same issue when running build as a user not as a root so without ZFS backend:
```
(...)
STEP 12: COMMIT localhost/base:latest
ERRO[0188] error deleting build container "6d3af66525be2933d3d88bccae33ad70d9176f5c9a87c2d29fdf7b3071294f87": identifier is not a container
 
ERRO[0188] error deleting build container "5c1a6170191451eb5cb13125900149646c27bbba48143bc50c48b70c59c1f2b9": identifier is not a container
 
ERRO[0188] error deleting build container "a154c733828f939f2caac3b57c3aeca845e23a52a1b1ac1582c70aa6c317b8d2": identifier is not a container
 
Failed to cleanup intermediate containers
```

Dockerfile used during that builds: https://paste.fedoraproject.org/paste/u4L5D6FS5U16cSksiKkLXA
@mskarbek Podman uses Buildah to perform builds - can you please file this against github.com/containers/buildah instead?
